name: Amazoness Call
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>アマゾネスの叫声</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アマゾネスコール</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Take 1 "Amazoness" card from your Deck, except "Amazoness Call", and either add it to your hand or send it to the GY. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Amazoness" monster you control; this turn, that monster can attack all monsters your opponent controls, once each, also other monsters you control cannot attack. You can only activate 1 "Amazoness Call" per turn.
eff: Take 1 "Amazoness" card from your Deck, except "Amazoness Call", and either add it to your hand or send it to the GY. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Amazoness" monster you control; this turn, that monster can attack all monsters your opponent controls, once each, also other monsters you control cannot attack. You can only activate 1 "Amazoness Call" per turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
